allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); imgs=d['data'].get\('images',[]\); print\([i['url'] for i in imgs[:2]]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(c['id'], c['icon'], c['name'], '→', len\(c.get\('children',[]\)\), 'sous-cat'\) for c in d['data'][:10]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('slug:', d['data']['slug']\); print\('name:', d['data']['name']\); print\('main_image:', d['data'].get\('main_image'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=d['data']; print\('OK - name:', p['name'], '| shop:', p.get\('shop',{}\).get\('name'\), '| images:', len\(p.get\('images',[]\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=d['data']; print\('✅ name:', p['name']\); print\('   shop:', p.get\('shop',{}\).get\('name'\)\); print\('   phone:', p.get\('shop',{}\).get\('phone'\)\); print\('   whatsapp:', p.get\('shop',{}\).get\('whatsapp'\)\); print\('   images:', len\(p.get\('images',[]\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d['data']; print\('✅ shop:', s['name'], '| verified:', s['is_verified']\)")
